official_status_source_name: DFW Adult Baseball Association official site
future_status_protocol: If DFW ABA publishes a field status, rainout notice, or schedule cancellation feed with clear labels, enable polling only after parser tests.
agent_rule: Official source wins. This organization site is not treated as a live rainout feed, so keep official status unknown unless a clear official closure/cancellation source is found. Tell the user to check the official source before leaving.
